_comment: Michigan RP Welcome Bot — Configuration File
_note: Set DISCORD_TOKEN as an environment variable, never put it here.

welcome_embed.title: Welcome to {server}, {username}! 🎉
welcome_embed.description:
Hey {mention}, we're thrilled to have you as our **{member_count}th member**!

Please take a moment to read our rules and get yourself set up. We hope you enjoy your time here.

dm_embed.title: Welcome to Michigan RP, {username}!
dm_embed.description:
Hey {mention} — thanks for joining **{server}**!

Here's everything you need to get started:

**📋 Read the Rules** — Keep things fair and fun for everyone.
**🎭 Pick Your Roles** — Head to #roles and grab your interests.
**💬 Introduce Yourself** — Say hi in #introductions!

If you have any questions, our staff team is always here to help. Enjoy your stay!
dm_embed.footer_text: Michigan RP • We're glad you're here!
